calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-02-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on regular calendar this day for settlement conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Maureen Howard. Plaintiff appearing by and through counsel, Daniel Piccinini, Esq. and Defendant represented by Chandler M. Sparler, Esq. Parties reached and agreement, terms of settlement on record. Trial date is vacated.
